rulings.Case Title: Kelly Kosky et al. v Wells Fargo & Company et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 20, 2022, line 1. Defendant's Demurrer to Complaint is continued to January 19, 2023 for the moving party to comply with SFRL 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of the moving papers and reply no later than December 27, 2022 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. (opposition and statement of interest received). Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: PASCUAL AJANEL RAMOS RAMOS ET AL VS. CARMEN A. SOLIS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Strike Complaint Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure 425.16 (Anti-Slapp) By Defendant Leo Bautista, As Trustee Of The Carmen Solis Settlement Trust
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 20, 2022, line 5. Defendant's Anti-Slapp Motion is DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain its burden and show that any claims asserted arise out of protected activity. The Court doesn't find the motion to be frivolous and the request for sanctions is denied. Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: KENNY LU VS. DUC T. LUU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants' Notice Of Motion For Attorney'S Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 20, 2022, line 6. Defendant's Motion for Attorney's Fees is GRANTED as follows: attorney's fees are granted to the prevailing party in this action in the amount of $5,200 at $325 for the time necessarily incurred in defending this action. Costs are not properly before this Court on this motion. Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: BRICK & TIMBER, INC. VS. MARY MATVY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 20, 2022, line 8. Defendant's Demurrer to Complaint is SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Notice did not include information for payment (name and address) for mail delivery. The Court notes that a removal of the words "in person" would have made the Notice complaint with CCP 1161. Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: MFR APARTMENTS, LLC VS. NAEEM FAROKHNIA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 20, 2022, line 9. Defendant's Demurrer to Complaint is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently states a cause of action for forcible detainer. Any factual issues regarding Defendant's purported tenancy are not properly raised on this motion. Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
